title: A phase II peri-operative study of pembrolizumab plus lenvatinib for mucosal melanoma
abstract: Published online: 16 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-73190-1 Mucosal melanoma is a rare and aggressive subtype which, unlike cutaneous melanoma, shows limited response to immune checkpoint inhibition. Here, the authors report the safety and efficacy of neoadjuvant pembrolizumab (anti-PD-1) and lenvatinib (multi tyrosine kinase inhibition) in patients with resectable mucosal melanoma, along with exploratory biomarker analysis.
